transcription: Pandaka vhenekwa ,zvakaonekwa Kuti ndanga ndisina dambudziko rekufungisisa.ndakatanga kumwa mishonga pazuva,ndakatanga neyaiva isina simba ndikatevera neyanga ine simba guru nekuti ndairwadziwa zvikuru nechifuva.
translation: my stress test was negative.  started on monocor 5 mg once/day and increased to 7.5 mg once a day as i was having frequent chest pain and 85 pvc s / hour.
reference: my stress test was negative.  started on monocor 5 mg once/day and increased to 7.5 mg once a day as i was having frequent chest pain and 85 pvc s / hour.
hypothesis: I was really tired of the constant need for reassurance. I started walking in the sun, I met strong people from the ancestral village, and I am now becoming a great elder, and a chief.

transcription: Unofunga kuti chingave chikonzero chei?.Chiremba wandakaona akati mutsipa wangu unemafuti uye mhasuru dzangu dzirikusungana
translation: what do you think could be the cause.  the doctor i saw said it was fat around my neck and that i may have a muscle spasm.
reference: what do you think could be the cause.  the doctor i saw said it was fat around my neck and that i may have a muscle spasm.
hypothesis: I am sure that you are tired of this. The thing I saw in your neighborhood had many footprints in the mud to return.

transcription: Nekudaro hakuna mushonga unorapa chirwere ichi. Kungomira nekutarisa kunogona kutopedza dambudziko iri. Miviri yedu inogona kuto zvipedza yega pachayo.
translation: As such there is no such cure for this condition.  Only wait and watch can cure such a problem.  Our immune system can gradually digest the extra pigments.
reference: As such there is no such cure for this condition.  Only wait and watch can cure such a problem.  Our immune system can gradually digest the extra pigments.
hypothesis: In Kudaro, there is no one who prays at this church. Standing and looking, we can finish this problem. Our two bodies can finish the job.
